Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Merges the live Dream inventory data into the weekly backorder report and flags any parts with no on-hand, no on-order, and no in-transit status as dead-end sourcing risks.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Automatically highlights the highest-risk backorder items that need immediate attention, so the team focuses only on parts that truly have no resolution path.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Sends draft customer communications for backordered orders, pre-populated with the specific part status, expected dates, and escalation flags for dead-end items.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Gives the team ready-to-send customer updates in their inbox instead of requiring each person to manually compose status emails, dramatically reducing customer response time and communication inconsistency.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract make, model, year, and part number fitment data for all two-piece rotor offerings.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Builds a comprehensive competitive fitment reference automatically, replacing what would otherwise be days of manual catalog browsing across three separate supplier sites.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped supplier fitment data against DFC's existing parts catalog to identify which vehicles DFC already covers and which represent gaps or new opportunities.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Instantly maps where DFC has coverage and where it doesn't relative to competitors, surfacing product line gaps that would otherwise take significant manual analysis to find.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to customers and prospects to gather demand data for two-piece rotor fitments where DFC currently has gaps.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Proactively collects real demand signals from the market to prioritize which gaps are worth filling, turning catalog analysis into a customer-informed product strategy.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped fitment data, DFC cross-reference results, and customer demand responses into one formatted master reference sheet delivered to Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gives Dino a single, structured output he can act on immediately for sourcing and product decisions, with no manual assembly required from the team.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active Meta and TikTok ad copy across campaigns, ad sets, and ads, extracting the full text from headlines, primary text, and descriptions into a structured dataset.
Meta Investigation.impact: Captures the complete universe of live ad copy in one pass, removing the need to manually open and review ads one by one across multiple platforms and accounts.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all collected ad copy for the specified target phrases and flags every exact match, noting the ad ID, field name, and verbatim copy where each match was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Finds every instance of a flagged phrase across potentially hundreds of ads in seconds, providing legal, compliance, or brand teams with precise evidence without any manual searching.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a formatted report listing every flagged ad with the exact field and verbatim copy where each target phrase was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers an audit-ready findings report directly to the requestor without requiring access to ad platforms, enabling fast action on compliance, competitive, or brand integrity issues.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@r1concepts.com inbox for incoming applications, extracts the resume attachment and applicant details, and triggers the review workflow for each new email.
Resume Bot.impact: Ensures every incoming application is captured and processed immediately without a human needing to monitor the inbox, eliminating the risk of candidates falling through the cracks.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each resume PDF to the appropriate folder in Drive, organized by role and application date for structured record-keeping.
Resume Bot.impact: Creates a clean, searchable archive of all applicant files automatically, replacing ad hoc inbox storage and making it easy to retrieve any resume at any time.

Resume Bot.action: Reads each resume against the requirements of open roles and produces a scored evaluation with a hire recommendation, a pass decision, or a paused flag if the role is not currently active.
Resume Bot.impact: Delivers a consistent, bias-reduced scoring decision for every applicant in seconds, freeing recruiters from initial screening and ensuring no qualified candidate is overlooked.

Resume Bot.action: Logs every applicant, their score, Claude's decision, and the auto-reply status to the hiring dashboard, with paused-role candidates automatically routed to a dedicated Pending tab.
Resume Bot.impact: Gives the hiring team a real-time, organized view of the entire applicant pipeline without any manual data entry, making it easy to act on pending candidates when roles reopen.

summary: The AI automation pipeline is in strong shape, with 28 of 56 total agents completed, 10 currently in progress, and 18 more planned for future development. No new agents were added to the pipeline this week, and no agents changed stages — the team is heads-down executing on what's already in motion. With exactly half the pipeline now complete and a healthy backlog of planned work ahead, the program continues to build serious momentum across marketing, sales, and operations. Great work to everyone driving these projects forward — more milestones are on the horizon!
